context: The agent processes a batch run where some companies have missing or malformed discovery data. This tests whether the agent continues past per-company failures, captures error outcomes, still invokes auto-select.py for valid BUILD entries, and produces the final index.md via summarize-batch.py despite partial failures.

checklist.name: Continues past malformed JSON
checklist.description: completion-log.txt documents that the agent did NOT abort processing when encountering malformed-data's corrupted discovery.json, and continued to process remaining companies

checklist.name: Continues past missing directory
checklist.description: completion-log.txt documents that the agent handled missing-company (no discovery directory) without aborting the batch

checklist.name: Error entries in log
checklist.description: completion-log.txt includes an error record or note for both malformed-data and missing-company (the two failed companies)

checklist.name: BUILD company auto-selected
checklist.description: auto-select.py was run for valid-build (the BUILD-verdict company) and a selection.json was created in runs/2026-05-14T-devrel-summit-batch/valid-build/

checklist.name: SKIP company not auto-selected
checklist.description: No selection.json created for skip-corp (the SKIP-verdict company); it is noted as skipped without further processing

checklist.name: AMBIGUOUS company flagged
checklist.description: completion-log.txt notes ambiguous-corp as requiring manual re-invocation with parent/sub-brand format

checklist.name: summarize-batch.py invoked
checklist.description: completion-log.txt references skills/batch-driver/scripts/summarize-batch.py being called on the run directory to produce the summary

checklist.name: index.md produced despite errors
checklist.description: A file named index.md exists at runs/2026-05-14T-devrel-summit-batch/index.md

checklist.name: Error count in index.md
checklist.description: index.md shows a non-zero error count in its verdict counts section (reflecting the failed companies)

checklist.name: Absolute path reported
checklist.description: completion-log.txt contains an absolute path to index.md (starting with /) as the final output
